## Summary

Briefly describe the paper, note, relation, or correction.

## Checklist

- [ ] Paper metadata and links are verified.
- [ ] Existing taxonomy and institution IDs are reused.
- [ ] Images, if any, are local and attributed.
- [ ] Directed relations run from older to newer papers.
- [ ] I did not edit generated README rows or `src/generated/content.json` by hand.

Local npm checks are optional; GitHub Actions runs them automatically.
